pdf.summary: Hi , I'm offering full rights to *Eldor's Chronicles*, a LOTR-inspired open-world RPG with balanced spells, epic scenarios, and character designs in a ready 180-page slide deck. Full GDD under NDA. Seeking $200k lump-sum buyout—no royalties needed or partnership to finish an awesome game. Let's discuss? Best, Wael Al Abessi. Echoes of Eldrador Continent : Eldor Realm of Eldrador: A land of contrasting landscapes and ancient mysteries. Region : North The Dragon’s Spine & Spire of Arkon Dragon’s Spine: A rugged mountain range where ancient forests murmur forgotten secrets. Spire of Arkon: Snow-capped peaks that rise above the land, juxtaposing with other harsh landscapes. Inhabitants: Dwarven clans (e.g., those of Kragnir) delve into deep ruins, and remnants of elven realms (like Elyria) hint at old magic and lost civilizations. Arkon Keep Arkon’s Keep High Forge The Stoic Guardian: A warrior or sentinel deeply tied to the region, perhaps tasked with guarding the ancient secrets of the Spire. Their backstory might involve a personal oath or a lost family legacy intertwined with dragon lore. Role: Protector of ancient secrets and the Spire’s legacy. Traits: Disciplined, unwavering, st...

assets.path: (My eyes gleam with a sense of exci.txt
assets.summary: (My eyes gleam with a sense of excitement and anticipation as I rise from my chair, my staff in hand.) Ah, the time has come to embark on this grand adventure! As Eryndor, the Wayfarer, I shall guide you through the realms of Eldrador, sharing my knowledge and expertise to aid you in your journey. With the regions of Eldrador fresh in you...

1. Illustration Concepts for the North Region A. Geographical & Landscape Elements Dragon’s Spine & Spire of Arkon Illustration Concept: A panoramic view of a jagged, towering mountain range with deep, twisting valleys. The central focus is the Spire of Arkon—a snow-capped, towering peak with icy ridges catching the early light. Clouds sw...

assets.path: Chapter Four The Path to Al'Khutm.txt
assets.summary: Chapter Four: The Path to Al'Khutm The sun beat down upon the dunes with relentless force, turning sand to molten gold beneath our weary steps. The heat shimmered in waves, blurring the line between sky and earth, and shadows danced at the edge of vision—spectral forms summoned by heat and exhaustion. “My young friend,” I murmured, my voi...

assets.path: Chapter Three Secrets Beneath the S.txt
assets.summary: Chapter Three: Secrets Beneath the Sands (Eryndor's voice resonates, weaving tales that make the desert itself seem to lean in and listen.) As we stepped through the sandstone gates of Qud-Shara, the air thickened with the scent of spices, smoke, and whispered promises. Merchants shouted from colorful stalls adorned with vibrant silks and...

assets.path: Chapter Two Into the Whispering Was.txt
assets.summary: Chapter Two: Into the Whispering Wastes The sun hung low and merciless over the sprawling sands of the Whispering Wastes, casting long shadows that danced like restless spirits. The dunes rolled endlessly, their golden crests shifting with every breath of wind, as if the desert itself were alive—watching, waiting. I tightened the straps o...

Per project direction, the demo renames the hero to `Aedrys` everywhere in UI, dialogue, quest text, and code-facing lore. ## Lore - Eldor is...

assets.path: In the ancient and whispering realm.txt
assets.summary: In the ancient and whispering realms of Eldrador, a land steeped in eldritch wonder and age-old enchantments, the threads of legend weave through earth and sky. The world, divided by the hands of creation into four great dominions—the luminous West, the enigmatic East, the solemn North, and the wild, shape-shifting South—shelters ancient ...

Integration of All Project Elements Characters & Dialogues: Eidryss: Player avatar—his growth from novice to hero is mirrored by new skills unlocked after each major milestone (e.g., Frost Ward, Windwalk, Whisperwind, Cinderheart Amulet). Eryndor: Mentor NPC—provides guidance, essential lore, and occasional in-combat support (e.g., assist...

Map Legend: Spire of Arkon: Central, highest point represented at the top. Arkon Keep: Fortress located on the slope near the Spire. Dragon’s Spine: The continuous, jagged line representing the mountain range. Highforge, Stonevale, Boulderhelm: Marked settlement locations with symbols indicating dwarven strongholds or villages. Ancient Fo...

The Stoic Guardian: A warrior or sentinel deeply tied to the region, perhaps tasked with guarding the ancient secrets of the Spire. Their backstory might involve a personal oath or a lost family legacy intertwined with dragon lore.

A character (or group) representing an external threat or an internal corruption. This antagonist might seek to exploit the region’s ancient power, challenging the status quo and forcing other characters into conflict.

The Mystic Sage: A character versed in the ancient traditions and mystical arts, acting as both mentor and lore-keeper. They could be a retired warrior turned spiritual guide or a scholar who delves into the ancient texts preserved near the Spire.

A younger character emerging from humble origins within the mountains. They might be discovered as having a hidden connection to the dragons or the region's mystical energies, prompting a journey of self-discovery.

Storyboard Overview Below is a scene‐by‐scene breakdown (the “storyboard”) for a pitch to side studios. It includes every major element (characters, region details, lore, dialogues, and quest hooks) that has been created and shared in our project archives. Use this as the foundation for an initial pitch; subsequent steps (detailed level d...
